title: Standard Specification for Portland Cement

committee.name: Cement
committee.scope: Promotion of knowledge, stimulation of research, development of standards, methods of test, specifications, classifications, definitions of terms, and recommended practices for hydraulic cements.

scope: This specification covers ten types of portland cement, including five basic types and air-entraining and low-alkali variants, intended for use in concrete construction.

referencedStandards.title: Standard Test Methods for Chemical Analysis of Hydraulic Cement
Standard Test Method for Autoclave Expansion of Hydraulic Cement
Standard Test Methods for Fineness of Hydraulic Cement by Air-Permeability Apparatus
